database.name: VIEW SSCCR_FINACC_TRANS_V
database.view: SELECT get_uuid() AS ssccr_finacc_trans_v_id, fft.ad_client_id, '0' AS ad_org_id, fft.created, fft.createdby, fft.updated, fft.updatedby, fft.isactive, fft.fin_finacc_transaction_id, fft.em_ssccr_c_invoice_id AS c_invoice_id, fft.em_ssccr_c_order_id AS c_order_id, fft.em_ssccr_lot AS lot, fft.em_ssccr_ssfi_banktransfer_id AS ssfi_banktransfer_id, fft.em_ssccr_processor_banck_id AS ssccr_processor_banck_id, fft.em_ssccr_types_of_credit_id AS ssccr_types_of_credit_id, fft.em_ssccr_expiration_date AS ssccr_expiration_date, fft.em_ssccr_cards_types_id AS ssccr_cards_types_id, fft.em_ssccr_fin_payment_id AS fin_payment_id, fft.statementdate, round(fft.depositamt, 2) AS depositamt, CASE WHEN fft.depositamt = i.grandtotal THEN tax.impuesto ELSE fft.depositamt END AS impuesto, CASE WHEN fft.depositamt = i.grandtotal THEN i.totallines ELSE fft.depositamt END AS totallines, CASE WHEN fft.depositamt = i.grandtotal THEN i.grandtotal ELSE fft.depositamt END AS grandtotal, fft.em_ssccr_expiration_date AS expiration_date, fft.em_ssccr_recapno AS referenceno, fft.em_ssccr_reconciled AS reconciled FROM fin_finacc_transaction fft LEFT JOIN c_invoice i ON i.c_invoice_id = fft.em_ssccr_c_invoice_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT sum(c_invoicelinetax.taxamt) AS impuesto, c_invoicelinetax.c_invoice_id FROM c_invoicelinetax GROUP BY c_invoicelinetax.c_invoice_id) tax ON tax.c_invoice_id = i.c_invoice_id WHERE fft.em_ssccr_reconciled = 'N'
